Title: Login page UI elements are visible
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://practice.qabrains.com/ecommerce/login; 2. Check for heading with text 'Login'; 3. Verify email input field is visible; 4. Verify password input field is visible; 5. Verify login button is visible
Expected_Result: All UI elements including heading 'Login' email field password field and login button are visible

Title: @smoke Login page loads with all key elements
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://practice.qabrains.com/ecommerce/login; 2. Verify login heading; 3. Verify all input fields visible; 4. Verify login button visible
Expected_Result: Login page displays heading and all required form elements

Title: Logo click navigates to app landing route
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page; 2. Locate logo link with href='/ecommerce'; 3. Verify logo is visible; 4. Click logo link
Expected_Result: Page navigates to /ecommerce landing route or remains on /login as per app redirect rules

Title: Basic validation error appears for invalid email
Steps: 1. Enter invalid email 'abc'; 2. Leave password empty; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: Validation error is shown indicating invalid email or required field

Title: Basic validation error appears for invalid email format
Steps: 1. Enter email without @ symbol; 2. Enter password; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: Validation error displayed for invalid email format

Title: Basic validation error appears for empty password
Steps: 1. Enter valid email; 2. Leave password empty; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: Validation error shown for required password field

Title: Password show/hide toggle works
Preconditions: User is on login page with password filled
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page; 2. Fill password field with 'Secret@123'; 3. Click password toggle button; 4. Verify password value; 5. Click toggle again
Expected_Result: Password value remains intact while toggle switches visibility state

Title: Invalid credentials show generic error
Steps: 1. Enter email 'wrong@example.com'; 2. Enter password 'Wrong123'; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: User remains on login page with error message indicating invalid credentials

Title: Successful login redirects to home
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page; 2. Enter valid credentials; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: User is redirected to home page (/ecommerce URL is matched)

Title: @smoke Successful login with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page; 2. Enter valid test credentials; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: User successfully logs in and is redirected to home page

Title: Enter key submits login form
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page; 2. Fill email field with valid email; 3. Fill password field with valid password; 4. Press Enter key
Expected_Result: Login form is submitted and user is redirected or remains on login based on authentication result

Title: Keyboard tab order reaches interactive controls
Steps: 1. Navigate to login page; 2. Focus on email field; 3. Press Tab to move to password field; 4. Verify password field is focused; 5. Press Tab to move to toggle button; 6. Verify toggle button is focused; 7. Press Tab to move to login button
Expected_Result: Keyboard focus moves through all interactive controls in logical order

Title: Login API failure shows guarded behavior
Preconditions: Login API is mocked to fail with 500 error
Steps: 1. Mock login API to return 500 error; 2. Enter valid credentials; 3. Click login button; 4. Observe page behavior
Expected_Result: User remains on login page without being authenticated on API failure

Title: Long email and password values are handled safely
Steps: 1. Generate long email string (260+ characters); 2. Generate long password (140+ characters); 3. Fill email and password fields; 4. Click login button; 5. Verify form stability
Test_Data: email=very long string(260+ chars) password=P repeated 140 times
Expected_Result: Form accepts input safely with validation or input length limits applied

Title: @regression Empty email field shows validation error
Steps: 1. Leave email field empty; 2. Fill password field; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: Validation error displayed for required email field

Title: @regression Empty password field shows validation error
Steps: 1. Fill email field; 2. Leave password field empty; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: Validation error displayed for required password field

Title: @regression Whitespace-only credentials are rejected
Steps: 1. Fill email with whitespace only '   '; 2. Fill password with whitespace only '   '; 3. Click login button
Expected_Result: User remains on login page as whitespace-only input is rejected
